prestazioni: ECU remap via **APR Stage 2+ Software (MQB EA211 CHYA 1.0L TSI)** with custom dyno-tuned boost curve targeting 280 Nm (206 lb-ft) at 3,000 RPM and 140 HP (103 kW) at 6,200 RPM, utilizing a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport Cold Air Intake (FMICA0004P)** with integrated heat shield for optimized airflow and IAT reduction

Full **Milltek Sport 60mm Turbo-Back Exhaust System (30910)** with non-resonated center section and 304 stainless steel construction, paired with a **Scorpion 4-2-1 Equal-Length Header (VWUPGTI-ELH)** to eliminate turbo lag and improve scavenging efficiency

Suspension overhaul with **KW Suspensions Clubsport Coilovers (35241001)** featuring 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, preload), 30mm front/25mm rear lowering, and **Whiteline Adjustable Front Sway Bar (BMR79X)** with +25% stiffness to mitigate understeer, complemented by **SuperPro Polyurethane Bushings (SPF0116K, SPF0117K)** for subframe and control arms
estetica: **Rieger Tuning GT-Sport Front Bumper (VWUPGTI-FB-GT)** with integrated carbon fiber splitter and tow hooks, paired with a **Seibon Carbon Fiber GTI-Spec Rear Diffuser (VW-UP-GTI-RD)** for aggressive aero balance

**OMP Racing Pedal Set (OMP1118)** with aluminum construction and non-slip rubber inserts, combined with a **Sparco Assetto Gara II Seat (00779NRX)** in Alcantara/leather with FIA 8855-1999 homologation, mounted on **Sparco Seat Sliders (00798NRX)** for optimal driving position

**AP Racing Radi-CAL 2-Piece Front Brake Kit (CP9670-220N)** with 280mm rotors and 4-piston calipers, paired with **Ferodo DS2500 Brake Pads (FDB2120)** and **Goodridge G-Stop Stainless Steel Brake Lines (GSS1903)** for fade-resistant stopping power, finished with **BBS CH-R 17x7 ET38 Wheels (CHR707538)** in Gloss Black with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect (205/40R17)** tires
